titleStmt.title: SII 22.418: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 418. (A.R. No. 418 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, ŚĪVALAPPĒRI. AḺAGAR TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE RĀJARĀJA I—29th YEAR (A.D. 1013-14)

summary.p: This begins with introduction Tirumagaḷpōla etc. It records a gift of a lampstand and 25 sheep for burning a lamp in the temple of Karumāṇikkadēvar by the wife of a merchant by name Rāmaṉ Lakkuvaṇaṉ of Karavandapuram in Kaḷakkuḍi-nāḍu. Teṉ Tirumāliruñjōlai is said to be in Kīḻkaḷakkūṟṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpola perunilaicelviyum taṉakke Urimai pūṇ ṭamai maṉakkoḷa kān=taḷurcālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum ta
kuṭamalaināṭum kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻa maṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāṟ koṇ
Ellā yāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī koirājarājakecarivaṉmarāyiṉa śrī rājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 9
kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu teṉtirumāliruñcolai niṉṟaruḷiṉa karumāṇikka tevarkku kaḷakkuṭi nāṭṭu karavantapurattu viyāpāri Irāmaṉ Ilakkuvaṇaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ
vaicca nilaiviḷakku Oṉṟu Itaṉukku nicatam Āḻākku ney muṭṭāmal Eriyavaitta cāvāmūvāperāṭu [2 10 5] Ivvāṭu Irupattaiñcum koṇṭu Ittevar ceppunāṭṭu
muṭṭāmal Aṭṭuvatāṉa veṭṭikuṭi kiḻavaṉ kāḷiyāṉa tirumāliruñ colaiyeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.418 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
